name: Accepting card payments offline using Shopify POS

name: How do you handle offline POS orders during internet outages?
snippet:
At this time, it is not possible to process credit/debit payments offline on Shopify Point of Sale. Shopify Point of Sale needs an internet connection.
Shopify Point of Sale needs an internet connection to sync with your Shopify admin, send receipts by email, and take card payments. I recommend ...

name: Offline checkout on Shopify POS
snippet:
When you reconnect to the internet after being offline, your orders and inventory should sync automatically between Shopify POS and your Shopify admin. If your ...
From the POS app, tap the Connectivity Icon icon, and then deactivate Force offline checkout. From the cart, tap Go online in the offline checkout banner.

name: Does Shopify POS Work Offline? How Your Business Can Make The
snippet:
Yes, Shopify POS does work offline. Even if your internet connection drops, the system lets you continue processing sales without immediate disruptions.
The offline mode works with card swipes, chips, and tap payments. You'll need the internet to process gift cards or type in card numbers ...
Once your internet returns, the system automatically uploads all offline sales data to your main Shopify account. This sync updates your overall ...

name: What Are Offline Payments? How to Accept Them (2025) - Shopify
snippet: Learn how offline payments let merchants accept card payments during internet outages and keep sales flowing with Shopify POS.

name: Using Shopify POS offline
snippet: Using Shopify POS offline. Shopify POS needs an internet connection to sync with your Shopify admin, send receipts by email, and capture card payments.
